title: Neighborhood Concept in a Metric Space
description: A visual representation of a neighborhood N_r(x) as an open ball centered at a point x with radius r, showing interior points and the boundary.
relationships: Point x is the center of the neighborhood
Distance d(x,y) < r, so y is inside N_r(x)
Distance d(x,z) = r, so z is on the boundary of N_r(x)
Distance d(x,w) > r, so w is outside N_r(x)
